name: Credential Harvesting Response
description: Responds to phishing emails where the victim may have submitted credentials to a harvesting page. AI analysis determines whether credentials were compromised. If confirmed, an analyst approval gate ensures human oversight before forcing a password reset via Microsoft Graph and notifying the affected user. If no credentials were submitted, the sender is blocked as a preventive measure.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Microsoft Graph
required_integrations.reason: Force password reset for compromised user accounts

data.title: Phishing Alert Received
data.summary: Triggers on credential harvesting or phishing alerts

data.title: AI Phishing Analysis
data.summary: Analyze email for credential harvesting indicators

config.custom_instructions: Focus on credential harvesting indicators: login form links, fake SSO pages, POST form actions, user interaction evidence

data.title: Credentials Submitted?
data.summary: Did the user submit credentials to the phishing page?

data.title: Analyst Approval Required
data.summary: Require analyst confirmation before password reset

config.message: Credential harvesting confirmed by AI analysis. User {{$.trigger.alert.affected_user}} may have submitted credentials. Approve password reset?

data.title: Reset Password
data.summary: Force password reset via Microsoft Graph

config.message: Forcing password reset for {{$.trigger.alert.affected_user}} due to confirmed credential harvesting

data.title: Notify Affected User
data.summary: Email the user about the password reset and phishing incident

config.email_subject: Security Alert: Your password has been reset
config.message: Your account password was reset due to a credential harvesting phishing attack. Please set a new password immediately and enable MFA if not already active. Do not click links from the original phishing email. Contact IT Security if you need assistance.

data.title: Block Sender
data.summary: Block the phishing sender as preventive action

config.message: Blocking phishing sender {{$.trigger.alert.sender}} — no credential submission detected but sender is malicious

config.summary: Credential harvesting confirmed. Password reset forced and affected user notified.

data.title: End — Sender Blocked
data.summary: No credential compromise, sender blocked preventively

config.summary: Phishing email confirmed but no credentials were submitted. Sender blocked.
